title: Testing an AI-based strategy on XAUUSD surprising consistency so far
author: Delicious-Algae7241
selftext:
I’ve been experimenting with an AI-assisted setup to analyze gold (XAUUSD) over the past few days.

The main idea was to let the model identify volatility zones and momentum shifts, while I manually confirmed entries.

This screenshot shows one of the sessions I was testing a sell setup around 4079 and it played out better than expected. Still early to call it consistent, but the accuracy so far looks promising.

I’m also documenting some of these setups and notes in a small project I call “The AI Trader’s Playbook” it’s basically my way of organizing everything I learn.

Curious if anyone else here has tried combining AI tools with manual confirmations? What models or setups worked best for you?
